title: hymenophyllum interruptum
intro: Hymenophyllum interruptum, also known as the interrupted fern or mountain fern, is a species of epiphytic fern in the family Hymenophyllaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Hymenophyllum interruptum include its ability to treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its use as an anti-inflammatory to treat wounds and skin conditions. The herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
